prerequisites.value: Dueling Style, Dueling Style Aegis, Alertness, Combat Reflexes, Exotic Weapon Proficiency ( dueling sword ), Weapon Finesse, Weapon Focus ( dueling sword ).

description.value: **Benefit:** When you attempt to parry an attack using Dueling Style Aegis, you do not take any penalties on the attack roll incurred from using Combat Expertise or fighting defensively.
